calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner: Rebecca Kay Witt present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Beck Assoho Witt.
Decree signed in open court.
